title: Detection and Consequences
description: If caught trying to blackmail or engage in illegal diplomacy, your company may be expelled from the town for a period or pay large fines. Risk increases with investment in the city - more to lose.
definition-of-done: Detection system for illegal diplomatic actions. Consequences include expulsion and fines. Consequences scale with investment level. Detection events have presentation.
testing-plan: Verify detection triggers correctly. Test consequence application. Verify scaling with investment. Test event presentation.
